data_contract_notes: Not applicable - this is a config behavior fix, not a data structure change

what_is_present: Root cause identified: config not applied during scrapePool.restartLoops (reload path) only during sync
Scope of fix: both always_scrape_classic_histograms AND convert_classic_histograms configs
Acknowledgment that testing is incomplete: 'I don't see any existing test covering those reload behavior'
Author verified locally: 'I verified this PR locally and hot reload worked'
what_is_missing: No explicit acceptance criteria or test cases provided
No error conditions described (what if reload fails? what if config is invalid?)
No explanation of WHY these configs weren't applied in restartLoops (was it oversight?)
No before/after behavior description with concrete examples
No description of which scrape configs are affected or how to verify the fix works
No guidance on what manual testing was done or how to reproduce the original bug
Admits test coverage gap but does not commit to adding tests
No explanation of the relationship between sync() and restartLoops() code paths
No specification of whether this affects all scrape configs or a subset

title: hot reload always_scrape_classic_histograms and convert_classic_histo…
author: yeya24
